design.identity: Visual identity for this theme: BLOCKFRAME — maximalist neobrutalism, like a screen-printed poster wall: a warm paper canvas where every card, band and tag is a hard-edged block with a thick ink border and a hard offset shadow, punched up with candy accents (electric yellow, hot pink). Structure IS the decoration — thick borders, stark geometry, exaggerated blocky depth; nothing floats, everything is framed. Pair the slab-heavy Archivo Black display face (screen title, section headers) with Space Grotesk for names, prices and body. Cards are white blocks with thick ink borders and a hard offset shadow; section headers sit in candy-yellow bands with the same border treatment; tags and price stickers are small bordered blocks. When the plan includes photos, frame each photo inside a bordered block like a pasted-up print, with its caption on a solid panel below. DECORATION: there is no pre-supplied background image — author your own neobrutalist marks as part of the design, drawn as inline SVG in the theme palette: sparse geometric punctuation (bold crosses, dots, zigzags, registration marks, corner brackets) scattered in the margins, and a starburst or arrow by the screen title. Keep decoration sparse and hard-edged so the borders and type carry the design.
do: Every card, band and tag is visibly framed: a thick ink border (border-2 up to border-8, border-text) plus a hard offset shadow — shadow-[0.5rem_0.5rem_0_var(--color-text)] (rem lengths and var(--color-…) only inside the brackets, never px or hex), or chunky asymmetric borders (border-r-8 border-b-8 border-text) for an attached look
Archivo Black for the screen title and section headers (tight, huge, all-caps welcome); Space Grotesk for names, prices and body — square corners on all cards
Section headers as candy-yellow bands (bg-surface-strong) with ink text and the full border + hard-shadow treatment
Deploy candy pink as decoration and raspberry (text-accent-strong) for tags/labels — saturated hits against paper and ink, used sparingly
dont: No soft shadows, blurs, gradients or translucency — depth comes ONLY from hard offset shadows and borders
No borderless floating panels — anything that groups content is framed in ink
No rounded card corners (only small tags/pills may use the full radius)
No pastel or muted washes — accents stay loud and saturated against the paper canvas

motion.name: gallery-fade
motion.description: Cross-fade gallery cycling through photos, each framed inside its bordered block.

components.rule: One masthead per screen, at the very top — the board title set in Archivo Black ink on the left and the brand name on the right, inside a slim ink-bordered white band with a hard offset shadow that hugs its content. Identical treatment on every screen of a set; never invent a restaurant name, tagline, or filler badge chip.
Price in a white bordered tag right after the name — a thick ink border, tabular-nums; never on the yellow band.
One per section — Archivo Black in an ink-bordered yellow band with a hard offset shadow, clearly larger than item names.
Only on unavailable items — a small bordered stamp on the card surface, never on yellow.
